caption: Eddie you bringing that potato salad Saturday or not. Gloria's planning around it and she's already annoyed at me for something unrelated.
Yeah I got it. What'd you do this time
Nothing I can prove. You at Rosie's tomorrow still, 8 o'clock?
Always. You see the Pirates game last night
Caught the last two innings. Same result as always.
🙄 at least we're consistent
Consistency is a virtue. So they tell me.
Who tells you that
Team pulled it out 8 to 6 today. Jake went 2 for 3. Proud of these kids.
Cornhole boards for the church picnic. Sanded and sealed, Steelers on one, Pens on the other.
Opening day at Millvale Community Park. Twenty-two kids, all of them grinning.
New workbench is done. Only took me three weekends and words Gloria didn't approve of.
Batting practice ran long. Emma stayed to shag balls, wouldn't leave till it got dark.
Finished the toy chest for Luca's birthday. Cedar bottom so it smells right.
Rained out again. Kids more disappointed than me and that's saying something.
Rebuilt the pitching rubber at the park myself. Nobody else was gonna do it.
Sunday brisket. Twelve hours on the smoker, worth every one.
Danny brought his JV crew out to help us rake the infield. Good boys.
Made a step stool so Sophie can reach the kitchen counter. She calls it her podium.
Team photo day. Getting seven-year-olds to hold still is its own sport.
Birdhouse number four this month. Gloria says the yard's turning into a subdivision.
Practice at 5:30 sharp. Half the team forgot their gloves. We ran laps.
Coat rack for the firehouse reunion hall. Oak, forty years overdue.
Jake's first stand-up double. Kid rounded first like he'd invented the game.
Refinished Gloria's grandmother's rocker. She cried. I told her it was the stain fumes.
Won the makeup game against Etna. Rematch was sweeter than the first.
Cutting boards for the whole coaching staff. Rick keeps asking where his is.
Fall ball wrapped up today. Handed out the trophies I've had since summer.
Planter boxes for the parish garden. Father Dolan supervised, meaning he drank coffee.
Team ran the bases twelve times before I let them hit. Conditioning wins games.
New mailbox post. Old one finally rotted through after twenty-six winters.
Emma helped me glue up the bookshelf. She clamped it crooked and I left it that way.
Snow day. Spent it in the garage sharpening chisels and listening to Springsteen.
Rosie had the good sausage in this morning. Eddie ordered two before I sat down.
Pens went to overtime again. My heart can't take a full season of this.
Somebody at Giant Eagle had a cart full of Yuengling. Man knows how to prepare.
Pirates actually strung together three hits in a row. Framed the box score.
Gloria's tomatoes came in early. Whole kitchen smells like the harvest.
Steelers defense looked like the old days for one quarter. I'll take it.
Watched a young fella at the park teach his boy to throw. Good to see.
Neighbor's kid shoveled my walk without being asked. There's hope yet.
Iron City on special at the corner store. Bought a case out of principle.
Danny's football team made the playoffs. Told him not to let it go to his head.
Eddie swears the diner changed its coffee. It hasn't. He says that every year.
Sophie drew me at the ballfield. Gave me a bat bigger than the dugout.
Pitt basketball went to double OT. Gloria went to bed. I stayed up like a fool.
Church picnic was packed. Sold out of the cornhole boards I donated.
Sat on the porch and watched the storm roll in off the river. Best seat in Millvale.
